subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One, how can I portray that which is written and recorded, for the secrets of hearts cannot be expressed, and the verses of breasts remain beyond elucidation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق چه نگارم آنچه تقریر و تحریر شود اسرار قلوب تعبیر نگردد و ایات صدور
subcodes.subjects: @immateriality; ineffability of soul; spirit, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
